## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Siit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and website optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance showing positive signs with increased trials from direct organic sources](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Need to implement better tracking to attribute leads to specific content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Shalom's content clustering framework shared to improve topic coverage and organization](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Airtable structure to be updated for better navigation and alignment with Shalom's clusters](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [New product features announced, including standalone knowledge base and upcoming solution pages](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Lead Attribution

  - [Seeing good signs with more trials coming from direct organic sources](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Unable to directly attribute leads to GrowthX articles yet](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Plan to involve Kyle or Jimmy in next call for deeper lead tracking and attribution](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Total impressions before and after content refresh showing positive trends](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Interest in understanding which industries (FinTech, healthcare) are driving traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Content Strategy and Focus

  - [Planning to lean more into FinTech content and start covering retail sector](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Shalom shared a content clustering framework to ensure comprehensive topic coverage:](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [Main keywords: ITSM, modern ITSM, ITIL, ITSM maturity](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [First derivative: Internal help, service desk, IT inventory, workflows, triage](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Second derivative: Specific features like Slackbot, Teamsbot, AI triage](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [Industry verticals, IT persona focus, ITSM initiatives, organization types](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)

### Airtable Organization and Improvements

  - [Current structure challenging for Carmel to navigate and add ideas](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Plan to add Shalom's clusters to the Airtable for better organization](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Will create new views to improve visibility of main IT topics](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Adding option to filter by Shalom's organization](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Minor updates needed: adding nonprofit industry, software category](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)

### Upcoming Content Priorities

  - [Prioritize the Congee article for next week](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Consider product screenshots for more realistic representation](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [Timing aligns well with upcoming LinkedIn live event with Congee](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)

### Product Updates and Website Improvements

  - [New standalone knowledge base feature released](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Ability to sync and search knowledge base within Siit portal](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Development of new solution pages in progress:](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [Service desk, automated workflows, analytics and reporting, collaboration, security and compliance](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [Recommendation to create individual pages for each feature, but as a "nice to have" rather than urgent priority](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)

### Next Steps in Content Strategy

  - [Approaching the end of content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Need to decide on the next area of focus in a couple of weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Team to provide recommendations for next steps](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)

  - [Prioritize Congee article for next week](https://fathom.video/share/Z2kU2GNp3Vnd5Hte7nXqXB8LK8bzkfsS?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
